name: viator-mcp
description: Search Viator tours, activities and experiences — products, pricing, availability schedules, attractions, and destinations via the Viator Partner API

viator_api_key.title: Viator Partner API Key
viator_api_key.description: Your Viator Partner API key (exp-api-key). Sign up as a Viator affiliate — Basic Access is free (partnerresources.viator.com).

viator_language.title: Language
viator_language.description: Accept-Language for response text, e.g. en-US, es, fr, de, ja (default: en-US)

viator_cache_ttl.title: Read Cache TTL (seconds)
viator_cache_ttl.description: Cache identical search/read responses for this many seconds to stay under Viator's rate limits (default: 60; set 0 to disable)

viator_static_cache_ttl.title: Static Cache TTL (seconds)
viator_static_cache_ttl.description: Longer cache TTL for reference data — destinations, tags, locations, exchange rates (default: 3600; set 0 to disable)

tools.name: vt_search_products
tools.description: Search tours/activities with structured filters (destination, tags, price, dates, rating)

tools.name: vt_get_product
tools.description: Get full details for one product by product code

tools.name: vt_list_product_tags
tools.description: List all product tags (id, hierarchy, names per locale)

tools.name: vt_get_attraction
tools.description: Get details for one attraction by id

tools.name: vt_get_availability_schedule
tools.description: Get availability + pricing schedule for a product

tools.name: vt_search_freetext
tools.description: Free-text search across products, attractions, destinations

tools.name: vt_list_destinations
tools.description: List all Viator destinations (ids, hierarchy, metadata)

tools.name: vt_get_exchange_rates
tools.description: Get exchange rates between supported currencies
